LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT TO THE COURT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: R. WOODS, NOT REPORTED. calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Jul-03-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiff WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s unopposed "MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit to the court a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
